title: GetSPELVar Method, Spel Class
parameters:
varName	String expression that evaluates to the name of the SPEL+ variable.

retValue	Return value of variable.
description: Returns the value of a SPEL+ variable.
notes: The SPEL+ variable is normally a system library variable in the current EPSON RC+ project.
see_also:
SetSPELVar

GetSPELVar Example

Dim count As Integer

count = m_spel.GetSPELVar("count")

		MsgBox "You ran " & count & " parts."
examples:
Dim count As Integer

count = m_spel.GetSPELVar("count")
		MsgBox "You ran " & count & " parts."
